The strategic implication is that mBridge won't displace bridge assets like XRP for years — but it will constrain XRP's maximum addressable market by claiming the bilateral central bank corridor space. The coexistence scenario (XRP bridges NON-participating central banks) is the most likely medium-term outcome.

This IS the compound stress trigger — it moves the system to CRITICAL.
